overview.name: SoulLoader — Agent Soul Initialization System
overview.description: Reads all .soul.md files from .agent-souls/ on kernel boot, parses YAML front-matter and personality sections, injects soul config into WhiteCrew/BlackCrew agent instances. Activates ElevenLabs voice IDs per agent.
overview.integration_point: archonx/kernel.py __init__ or boot() — called before any agent initialization

soul_file_format.description: Each .soul.md file has YAML front-matter fenced by --- markers followed by markdown body

example_front_matter.format:
---
agent_id: pauli_king
role: master_orchestrator
crew: white
piece_type: king
voice_id: EXAVITQu4vr4xnSDxMaL
voice_name: Pauli Prime
model: claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022
personality_traits:
  - strategic
  - decisive
  - calm under pressure
communication_style: direct, brief, authoritative
primary_tools:
  - task_routing
  - council_invocation
  - human_escalation
email: pauli@archonx.io
twitter_handle: '@PauliKingAI'
---

soul_file_format.body_sections: Markdown body contains personality narrative, soul backstory — parsed as soul.description

fields.piece_type: enum: king | queen | rook | bishop | knight | pawn

SoulRegistry.description: Collection of all loaded souls, indexed by agent_id

methods.get_crew(crew: str) -> list[AgentSoul]: Get all souls for a crew (white/black)
methods.get_by_piece(piece_type: str) -> list[Ag: Get all souls of a piece type

SoulLoader.description: Reads .soul.md files, builds SoulRegistry, injects into agents.

methods.load_all() -> SoulRegistry: Scan souls_dir recursively, parse all .soul.md files, return SoulRegistry
methods._parse_soul_file(path: Path) -> AgentSou: Parse YAML front-matter + markdown body from one file
methods.inject_into_crew(crew_agents: list, regi: For each agent in crew, find matching soul by agent_id, attach soul to agent.soul property
methods.validate_registry(registry: SoulRegistry: Return list of warnings: missing required fields, unknown piece types, duplicate agent_ids

frontmatter_extraction.pattern: Content between first --- and second --- markers (YAML block)
frontmatter_extraction.error_handling: If YAML parse fails: log warning, skip file, include in validate_registry() warnings

parsing_rules.body_extraction: Everything after closing --- is the markdown body (soul description)
parsing_rules.file_encoding: UTF-8 (soul files may contain Spanish/unicode characters)

kernel_integration.integration_location: __init__ or boot() method, BEFORE WhiteCrew/BlackCrew are initialized

voice_activation.description: ElevenLabs voice IDs from soul files can be used when agents speak
voice_activation.usage: When kernel needs to generate agent voice: use soul.voice_id with ElevenLabs API
voice_activation.scope: Voice activation is Phase 2 scope — SoulLoader just LOADS the voice_id, doesn't call ElevenLabs

soul_enrichment.description: After loading, each agent has a soul property with full personality + tools
soul_enrichment.usage_in_prompts: When building system prompts for agents, include soul.description and soul.personality_traits for roleplay fidelity
soul_enrichment.example: system_prompt = f'You are {soul.agent_id}, a {soul.role}. {soul.description}. Your style: {soul.communication_style}'

error_handling.missing_souls_dir: Log warning: '.agent-souls directory not found — agents will run soulless'. Do not crash kernel.
error_handling.malformed_soul_file: Log warning with file path, skip file, continue loading others
error_handling.missing_required_field: Log warning, use None as default, continue
error_handling.duplicate_agent_id: Log error, keep first occurrence, skip duplicate

test_requirements: test_load_all_37_souls: Load all files, assert registry.count() == 37
test_parse_yaml_frontmatter: Parse sample soul file, verify all fields extracted correctly
test_parse_body_description: Verify body text after --- is in soul.description
test_missing_soul_file_skipped: Malformed file in directory, verify others still loaded
test_inject_into_crew: Crew agents get matching soul attached
test_validate_warnings: Soul missing required field produces warning in validate_registry()
test_voice_id_loaded: Voice ID from YAML front-matter is accessible in AgentSoul
builder_notes: PyYAML is safe_load only — never yaml.load() (security: prevents code execution from YAML)
glob pattern '.agent-souls/**/*.soul.md' must use pathlib.Path.rglob('*.soul.md') on Python
Soul files may not have perfect YAML front-matter yet — handle gracefully, log what's missing
If .agent-souls doesn't exist in a test env: create test soul files as fixtures, not real files
The property name on agents must be .soul (not .config or .personality) for consistency across codebase
